comments.author: GfG70
comments.body: So teacup with handle has been identified forever as being a profitable trading point on stocks. The investor business daily has literally been built around the entire concept. There was a book on it. My question is shouldn’t it be simple enough to have an AI software that looks for teacup with handle patterns developing and can initiate trades based on that pattern. I only found one AI product that seems to do pattern identification but still requires manual triggering of trades. The product tickeron.com seems to fall short of automatically trading. The next question is with tech today is tea cup with handle an outdated pattern all together?

comments.author: Huffs420
comments.body: I've been thinking similarly. With all this AI revolution it seems like there should be something to gather a pattern or some kind of incremental success.
